Ashwini.traits: Quick, pioneering, healing touch; loves speed and new beginnings.

Bharani.traits: Intense, creative, bears great responsibility; transforms through discipline.

Krittika.traits: Sharp, purifying, determined; cuts through falsehood, natural critic.

Rohini.traits: Charming, artistic, fertile and prosperous; loves beauty and comfort.

Mrigashira.traits: Curious, gentle, ever-searching; a seeker of knowledge and experiences.

Ardra.traits: Stormy, intellectual, emotionally deep; renewal after upheaval.

Punarvasu.traits: Optimistic, generous, resilient; always returns to the light.

Pushya.traits: Nourishing, dharmic, protective; considered the most auspicious star.

Ashlesha.traits: Hypnotic, perceptive, strategic; deep intuition, must guard against suspicion.

Magha.traits: Regal, proud, tradition-honouring; carries ancestral blessings.

Purva Phalguni.traits: Playful, romantic, artistic; enjoys life and gives generously.

Uttara Phalguni.traits: Loyal, helpful, dignified; success through partnerships and service.

Hasta.traits: Skilful, witty, dexterous; blessed hands — crafts, healing, trade.

Chitra.traits: Brilliant, aesthetic, architectural mind; creates beautiful things.

Swati.traits: Independent, adaptable, diplomatic; flourishes with freedom.

Vishakha.traits: Ambitious, focused, goal-devoted; victory after persistent effort.

Anuradha.traits: Friendly, devoted, succeeds away from birthplace; bridges people.

Jyeshtha.traits: Protective elder, responsible, occult depth; carries authority early.

Mula.traits: Investigative, philosophical, uproots to find truth; spiritual intensity.

Purva Ashadha.traits: Invincible optimism, persuasive, purifying; early victories.

Uttara Ashadha.traits: Righteous, enduring, universally respected; final, lasting victory.

Shravana.traits: Learned listener, connective, fame through knowledge and counsel.

Dhanishta.traits: Musical, wealthy, adaptable; rhythm in work and generosity in giving.

Shatabhisha.traits: Mystical, secretive healer, scientific mind; truth behind veils.

Purva Bhadrapada.symbol: Front of a funeral cot / two faces
Purva Bhadrapada.traits: Intense idealist, fiery speech, transforms suffering into wisdom.

Uttara Bhadrapada.symbol: Back of a funeral cot / serpent of the deep
Uttara Bhadrapada.traits: Calm depth, compassionate, controls anger into contemplative power.

Revati.traits: Gentle guide and protector of travellers; sweet, nourishing, prosperous ends.
